reach_why: Applies across continual learning, epistemology, memory stability, and AI alignment, despite relying on metaphorical primitives.
novelty_why: Reframes fundamentality as persistence under regularization pressure, not intrinsic permanence, yielding a fresh fallibilist interpretation.
falsifiable_why: Testable only after operationalizing metaphorical terms into measurable retention, regularization, and task-importance dynamics.
explanation: Knowledge persists through revisable protective commitments, not because any belief is inherently beyond loss.
